confirmedCannibalization.recommendation: Consolidate into one post, or differentiate: assign 'HABET app download' to one post and 'habet apk download' as the primary keyword for the other. The older post (habet-app-download-guide) should be the canonical version.

keywords: habet betting app real or fake
nearDuplicateRisks.recommendation: These two posts target nearly identical queries. Google may rank one over the other inconsistently. Options: (1) Consolidate into a single authoritative post, (2) Differentiate angles — e.g., one focuses on 'app legitimacy/licensing' and the other on 'user experience/reviews', (3) Add canonical tag pointing to the preferred post.

Article.implementationNote: Use Article schema with headline, author (HABET Sports Team), datePublished, dateModified, and description fields. Include publisher with logo.

HowTo.implementationNote: Use HowTo schema with name, description, step array. Each H3 section that represents a step should map to a HowToStep with name and text. Include totalTime where applicable.

FAQPage.implementationNote: No posts currently use FAQPage schema as primary type. However, all posts contain FAQ sections — consider adding FAQPage as a secondary schema (alongside Article or HowTo) using mainEntity with Question/Answer pairs for the FAQ section. This can improve rich result eligibility.
